programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys reckon petroliana is plentiful in the Lone Star State, but tracking down a Texas-sized honey hole proves much trickier than expected.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Best Of - Don't Judge A Pawn By Its
programme.desc: Will an 1842 Book of Mormon make Rick a believer? Will he wait for winter to come for a limited edition signed Game of Thrones, or be sucked in by P.T. Barnum's tell-all tale?

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew hunt a remote mountain pass, a gold drought puts huge pressure on Jacqui and Andrew, Levi and Bridget are left to hunt alone, and the Ferals hunt in the extreme Pilbara region.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Donnie confronts poachers, who appear to be stealing gold from his lease, and a disaster dam-wall break threatens to end all hope of repaying their investor on time.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Tom is forced to contend against a potentially treacherous ice jam; Marty tries to come up with a last-ditch effort to get away from the Revelation Mountains; those in the Ruby Valley find themselves in the path of a dangerous predator.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A 1940s Hi-Striker carnival game is dropped off for restoration. Can Rick and his guys ring the bell or will the crew strike out? Later, the guys hammer away at fixing up a rare, handmade nail gun from the 1800s.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny is feeling nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not have been a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way. Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name brand goodies.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In search of a rare race car for a client, the guys travel to Italy for what could be the biggest deal of their lives. But when their dolce vita dream goes bust, they hit the road and start picking.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on the most amazing and rare top dollar toys: a one-of-a-kind Hot Wheels, a vintage skateboard collection, and limited-edition Lionel train set.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: House mover Robbie MacKay is dragging a house up a mountain and long-haul drivers Mish Aladin and Dru Norman... hauling two massive mining tippers, are trapped by rising floodwaters.

programme.title: Cape Carnage: Killer Catch
programme.desc: The Wildcard battles sharks, a giant crocodile, chronic injury, arguments and persistent fog. All threatening to derail reaching their season target and hitting pay dirt.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Car wreckers Mike and Bozza tackle the sand dunes of Northwest Australia for a big payday and long-haul truckers, Mish and Drew, go swimming as wet season flooding swamps Australia’s Top End.

programme.title: Railroad Australia
programme.desc: The sugar train is desperate to hit its deadline for the first cane harvest of the year. Plus, the Gemco team tackle a problematic N-Class locomotive to get it back in service.

programme.title: Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly and G.W. take on the same road that almost sent G.W. over the edge the day before.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny is feeling nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not have been a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way. Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name brand goodies.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In search of a rare race car for a client, the guys travel to Italy for what could be the biggest deal of their lives. But when their dolce vita dream goes bust, they hit the road and start picking.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on the most amazing and rare top dollar toys: a one-of-a-kind Hot Wheels, a vintage skateboard collection, and limited-edition Lionel train set.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: House mover Robbie MacKay is dragging a house up a mountain and long-haul drivers Mish Aladin and Dru Norman... hauling two massive mining tippers, are trapped by rising floodwaters.

programme.title: Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly and G.W. take on the same road that almost sent G.W. over the edge the day before.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: Adam and Rob serve up their most annoying stings in the history of the Pain Index, chasing them with a tiny fish that has venom to die for.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Merv Hughes Fishing is a light hearted fishing show with some ripping catches, a few yarns (mostly true), mateship and of course a splash of comedy thrown in.

programme.title: Creek To Coast
programme.desc: This week we tackle Tasmania, rugged beauty and superb fishing awaits.

programme.title: Deadliest Roads
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly and G.W. take on the same road that almost sent G.W. over the edge the day before.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Pickle must face her fear of big cats as she continues to impress Troy with her natural snake hunting talent. Bill and Tes hunt stumble on a rumored government testing facility and find all they can handle. Dusty recruits a new hunting partner with a snake phobia while Zak and Aaron battle pythons and the supernatural.

programme.title: Australia ReDiscovered
programme.desc: Join Ricko as he heads to Broken Hill to tell of a wartime tragedy before he heads north to Longreach – the birthplace of Qantas and then onto Victoria for an epic tale of survival against the odds.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A 1940s Hi-Striker carnival game is dropped off for restoration. Can Rick and his guys ring the bell or will the crew strike out? Later, the guys hammer away at fixing up a rare, handmade nail gun from the 1800s.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny is feeling nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not have been a good idea. Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way. Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name brand goodies.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In search of a rare race car for a client, the guys travel to Italy for what could be the biggest deal of their lives. But when their dolce vita dream goes bust, they hit the road and start picking.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on the most amazing and rare top dollar toys: a one-of-a-kind Hot Wheels, a vintage skateboard collection, and limited-edition Lionel train set.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: House mover Robbie MacKay is dragging a house up a mountain and long-haul drivers Mish Aladin and Dru Norman... hauling two massive mining tippers, are trapped by rising floodwaters.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Car wreckers Mike and Bozza tackle the sand dunes of Northwest Australia for a big payday and long-haul truckers, Mish and Dru, go swimming as wet season flooding swamps Australia's Top End.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: During the middle of his flight, Marty realizes that he must make a detour, but he may not have enough fuel to reach his destination; Rich panics when his dogs run off to chase a deadly predator; Kyle finds himself up against a beast.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A customer brings by a disassembled 59 BMW motorcycle with a side car for Rick to restore. Will he be able to return the bike to its glory days or will missing parts force him to abandon the project?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Jenny, The Baker, The Prosthetics Maker
programme.desc: It's Brandi's birthday, so naturally, Jarrod brings her to an auction in Menifee. Darrell tries to find another 'All Ten' locker, needing a leg up to do so. Rene stands his ground to protect his honour.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: On the third leg of their Italian adventure, Mike and Frank head south to Sicily where an American contact agrees to show them around. Later, the search is on for a very specific vintage Vespa.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Dale tries to purchase a dilapidated helicopter, an old pistol from the 1700s that probably does not even work anymore and a horse-racing carriage from the 19th century.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man is face-to-face with a possibility of electrocution by live power after smashing into a light pole, leaving officers perplexed as to how the accident occurred.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: If a happy wife means a happy life then one man's in big trouble when he's suspected of driving under the influence of drugs. At stake is his job and big fines - but that is the least of his worries. Then, a standard ticket causes an aggressive reaction and a man speeding at double the limit claims he has a good reason but must convince the police first.

programme.title: The Force - Behind The Line
programme.desc: A woman's life is at risk and she doesn't know, a man on a boat goes overboard when confronted, and police close in on a stolen prestige car.

programme.title: The Force - Behind The Line
programme.desc: Police must act quickly when a desperate and dangerous bank robber is on the run.

programme.title: Caught On Dashcam
programme.desc: From distracted drivers to animals on the attack, and an unmissable heroic rescue – join us for more spills and thrills from the world of driving in this brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam.

programme.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
programme.desc: I'm Sheriff John Bunnell.\n\nAnd I can tell you from personal experience, that no officer wants to drive in a chase unless its absolutely necessary. Because the problem isn't the chase, its crash at the end of the chase.

programme.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
programme.desc: This episode features some of the worst rioting captured on video.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A customer brings by a disassembled 59 BMW motorcycle with a side car for Rick to restore. Will he be able to return the bike to its glory days or will missing parts force him to abandon the project?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Jenny, The Baker, The Prosthetics Maker
programme.desc: It's Brandi's birthday, so naturally, Jarrod brings her to an auction in Menifee. Darrell tries to find another 'All Ten' locker, needing a leg up to do so. Rene stands his ground to protect his honour.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: On the third leg of their Italian adventure, Mike and Frank head south to Sicily where an American contact agrees to show them around. Later, the search is on for a very specific vintage Vespa.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Dale tries to purchase a dilapidated helicopter, an old pistol from the 1700s that probably does not even work anymore and a horse-racing carriage from the 19th century.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: If a happy wife means a happy life then one man's in big trouble when he's suspected of driving under the influence of drugs. At stake is his job and big fines - but that is the least of his worries. Then, a standard ticket causes an aggressive reaction and a man speeding at double the limit claims he has a good reason but must convince the police first.

programme.title: World's Wildest Police Videos
programme.desc: This episode features some of the worst rioting captured on video.

programme.title: Bamazon
programme.desc: A group of unemployed Alabama construction workers begin a dangerous mission to the Amazon jungle in search of gold. When a devastating setback threatens to derail the operation, the team is pushed to its breaking point.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: Merv Hughes Fishing is a light hearted fishing show with some ripping catches, a few yarns (mostly true), mateship and of course a splash of comedy thrown in.

programme.title: Creek To Coast
programme.desc: Join Kim this week as she goes on a literal Creek to Coast adventure; touring the beautiful roads of northern New South Wales.

programme.title: Caught On Dashcam
programme.desc: From distracted drivers to animals on the attack, and an unmissable heroic rescue – join us for more spills and thrills from the world of driving in this brand-new episode of Caught on Dashcam.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Troy and Pickle attempt to track down a giant python known as the Night Serpent. Meanwhile, Tess convinces Bill to try out new hunting grounds.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 travel the world to prove that Blokes are the same all over the world and they all share the same passions.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A customer brings by a disassembled 59 BMW motorcycle with a side car for Rick to restore. Will he be able to return the bike to its glory days or will missing parts force him to abandon the project?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Jenny, The Baker, The Prosthetics Maker
programme.desc: It's Brandi's birthday, so naturally, Jarrod brings her to an auction in Menifee. Darrell tries to find another 'All Ten' locker, needing a leg up to do so. Rene stands his ground to protect his honour.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: On the third leg of their Italian adventure, Mike and Frank head south to Sicily where an American contact agrees to show them around. Later, the search is on for a very specific vintage Vespa.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Dale tries to purchase a dilapidated helicopter, an old pistol from the 1700s that probably does not even work anymore and a horse-racing carriage from the 19th century.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A man is face-to-face with a possibility of electrocution by live power after smashing into a light pole, leaving officers perplexed as to how the accident occurred.
